commit_message:
feat(f_to_f): Integrated Float-to-Fixed Design into RAH feat(f_to_f): Integrated Float-to-Fixed Design into RAH - Images: Added all relevant SVG files for this project.
- rtl/float_to_fix: Added all relevant Verilog files:
  - collector.v: Colletct data from rah and decode it and pass forword to float_to_fix or fix_to_float module
  - fixed_to_float.v: Calculate float point value for given input
  - float_to_fix.v: Calculate fix value for given float point value
  - dout.v: Creat packet fro
